title: Gate broad proof on recurring friction and structured escalation

non_goals: Do not suppress required high-risk proof; require an explicit escalation record instead.
Do not reintroduce a standalone proof/test matrix; build on #2333's existing config and Verification route authority.

effects: One pre-selection proof-route strategy identity controls commands, next action, and claim effect.
Applicable live Memory validation-friction findings are consumed before proof commands are selected.
Broad proof requires structured escalation evidence or explicit override instead of lane-count or lane-presence inference.
Start, implement, proof, handoff, and closeout preserve the same decision id and claim boundary.
excluded: Work outside the bounded closeout scope.
